'''âf-k-z''' ('''kafakaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbait|unbait]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-k-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbait|unbait]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-k-z
|-
! Lemma
| kafakaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifakaz|thifakaz]] || [[word:jifakaz|jifakaz]] || [[word:shifakaz|shifakaz]] || [[word:kifakaz|kifakaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufakaz|thuthufakaz]] || [[word:jujufakaz|jujufakaz]] || [[word:shushufakaz|shushufakaz]] || [[word:kukufakaz|kukufakaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufakaz|thufakaz]] || [[word:jufakaz|jufakaz]] || [[word:shufakaz|shufakaz]] || [[word:kufakaz|kufakaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufakaz|thufakaz]] || [[word:jufakaz|jufakaz]] || [[word:shufakaz|shufakaz]] || [[word:kufakaz|kufakaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefakaz|thefakaz]] || [[word:jefakaz|jefakaz]] || [[word:shefakaz|shefakaz]] || [[word:kefakaz|kefakaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofakaz|thothofakaz]] || [[word:jojofakaz|jojofakaz]] || [[word:shoshofakaz|shoshofakaz]] || [[word:kokofakaz|kokofakaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofakaz|thofakaz]] || [[word:jofakaz|jofakaz]] || [[word:shofakaz|shofakaz]] || [[word:kofakaz|kofakaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofakaz|thofakaz]] || [[word:jofakaz|jofakaz]] || [[word:shofakaz|shofakaz]] || [[word:kofakaz|kofakaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfakaz|thĂŠfakaz]] || [[word:jĂŠfakaz|jĂŠfakaz]] || [[word:shĂŠfakaz|shĂŠfakaz]] || [[word:kĂŠfakaz|kĂŠfakaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafakaz|thathafakaz]] || [[word:jajafakaz|jajafakaz]] || [[word:shashafakaz|shashafakaz]] || [[word:kakafakaz|kakafakaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafakaz|thafakaz]] || [[word:jafakaz|jafakaz]] || [[word:shafakaz|shafakaz]] || [[word:kafakaz|kafakaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafakaz|thafakaz]] || [[word:jafakaz|jafakaz]] || [[word:shafakaz|shafakaz]] || [[word:kafakaz|kafakaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafakaz|shafakaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafakaz|goshafakaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafakaz|gokishafakaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafakaznĂŒ|shafakaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafakaznknĂŒ|goshafakaznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafakaznĂŒ|gokishafakaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafakazshĂ«|shafakazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafakaznkshĂ«|goshafakaznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafakazshĂ«|gokishafakazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafakazro|shafakazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafakaznkro|goshafakaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafakazro|gokishafakazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafakazmu|shafakazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafakaznkmu|goshafakaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafakazmu|gokishafakazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafakazsher|shafakazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafakaznksher|goshafakaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafakazsher|gokishafakazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafakazng|shafakazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafakaznkng|goshafakaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafakazng|gokishafakazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafakazya|shafakazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafakaznkya|goshafakaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafakazya|gokishafakazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafakazyam|shafakazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafakaznkyam|goshafakaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafakazyam|gokishafakazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafakaznĂŒshĂ«|shafakaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafakaznknĂŒshĂ«|goshafakaznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafakaznĂŒshĂ«|gokishafakaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafakaznĂŒro|shafakaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafakaznknĂŒro|goshafakaznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafakaznĂŒro|gokishafakaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafakaznĂŒmu|shafakaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafakaznknĂŒmu|goshafakaznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafakaznĂŒmu|gokishafakaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafakazshĂ«nĂŒ|shafakazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafakaznkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshafakaznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafakazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishafakazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafakazshĂ«ro|shafakazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafakaznkshĂ«ro|goshafakaznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafakazshĂ«ro|gokishafakazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafakazshĂ«mu|shafakazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafakaznkshĂ«mu|goshafakaznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafakazshĂ«mu|gokishafakazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafakazronĂŒ|shafakazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafakaznkronĂŒ|goshafakaznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafakazronĂŒ|gokishafakazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafakazroshĂ«|shafakazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafakaznkroshĂ«|goshafakaznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafakazroshĂ«|gokishafakazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafakazromu|shafakazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafakaznkromu|goshafakaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafakazromu|gokishafakazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafakazmunĂŒ|shafakazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafakaznkmunĂŒ|goshafakaznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafakazmunĂŒ|gokishafakazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafakazmushĂ«|shafakazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafakaznkmushĂ«|goshafakaznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafakazmushĂ«|gokishafakazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafakazmuro|shafakazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafakaznkmuro|goshafakaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafakazmuro|gokishafakazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
